category_sources: source_facts.description says graph database; official GitHub organization describes OrientDB as a multi-model transactional DBMS: https://github.com/orientechnologies
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is orientdb; official GitHub organization and docs use OrientDB: https://github.com/orientechnologies/orientdb
docs_sources: Official documentation repository is orientechnologies/orientdb-docs, and orientdb.dev hosts OrientDB docs: https://github.com/orientechnologies/orientdb-docs
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository URL: https://github.com/orientechnologies/orientdb; official GitHub org pins orientdb as the OrientDB DBMS repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says graph database; official repository description says graph, document, reactive, full-text, and geospatial models.
